name: 8"x22" Luxe Jacquard Leopard Round Decorative Pillow Ivory - Threshold™: Cylinder Shape, Indoor Polyester Bolster
description:
Add some feline flair to your seating spot or bedscape with this Luxe Cheetah Jacquard Round Decorative Pillow from Threshold™. In a cylindrical silhouette, this bolster throw pillow has an ivory-colored surface adorned with tonal, raised cheetah spots for a tastefully textured aesthetic. It is made of jacquard fabric with comfy filling to provide plenty of cushioned comfort while you sit and relax.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
